body.title: Exit-42 restart loop: add crash rate-limit counter (max 3 in 60s → alert + exit 1)
body.result: Appends epoch timestamp each loop; prunes >60s; halts exit 1 if 4+ restarts in 60s; writes CRITICAL to alerts.txt. Syntax-checked. Committed 98915f15.
body.description: igor bash startup script loops on exit code 42 with no rate-limit. 5 crashes in 60s loops forever with no alerting. Fix: write a restart.counter file with timestamps; if 3 restarts in 60s, log CRITICAL to alerts.txt and exit(1) instead of 42 — stops the loop and leaves evidence. SRE finding from deep-audit Panel 11.
